title: Review Dark_Mellow package and capture MAP insights
description: Perform a deeper review of the Dark_Mellow GitHub package/installer after the wallpaper issue, identify potential installer/package risks, and use MAP emergence/insight protocols to capture workflow improvements discovered during the review.
acceptance_criteria: Review covers installer, launcher, README, desktop file, package assets, and likely cross-Mint/Cinnamon/GNOME issues
Findings are severity-ranked with concrete fixes or follow-up recommendations
At least one MAP emergence insight or idea is captured if warranted
Review and emergence artifacts are recorded durably
